name: Motion-Seeking Lenses
description:
When you wear these green-tinted glasses, all the movement in the surrounding area seems to jump out at you. You gain a +1 item bonus to your Perception DC against Stealth checks to or , and anyone attempting to Sneak doesn't benefit from the circumstance bonus from cover against your Perception DC.

Activate—Find the Hidden 1 (detection, manipulate)

You twist the lenses of your glasses as you look for someone . You with a +1 item bonus. If you find a hidden creature or object, you can Point Out as a free action.
